    <h1>{`sheetpoetry`}</h1>
    <h2>{`What is this?`}</h2>
    <p>{`This is a GraphQL API to generate poems from randomly selected cells on a Google spreadsheet.`}</p>
    <h2>{`How to use`}</h2>
    <p>{`The API takes a query called `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`sheetpoem`}</inlineCode>{` with 3 arguments:`}</p>
    <ul>
      <li parentName="ul"><inlineCode parentName="li">{`spreadsheetId`}</inlineCode>{` (String): The spreadsheet's ID.`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul"><inlineCode parentName="li">{`range`}</inlineCode>{` (String): The range of cells.`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul"><inlineCode parentName="li">{`verses`}</inlineCode>{` (Int): The number of verses.`}</li>
    </ul>
    <p>{`The `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`spreadsheetId`}</inlineCode>{` is your spreadsheet's unique identificator. Is the part of the URL selected in the image below and it looks similar to this: `}<em parentName="p">{`1qjgDw3TREpqQoSSbB0tzd0Joues1jraJix2mU52zToU`}</em>{`.`}</p>
    <p><a parentName="p" {...{
        "href": "/906714e7fb1226e5c7dbd5f079288227/id.gif"
      }}><img parentName="a" {...{
          "src": "/906714e7fb1226e5c7dbd5f079288227/id.gif",
          "alt": "spreadsheet Id"
        }}></img></a></p>
    <p><inlineCode parentName="p">{`range`}</inlineCode>{` is a selection of rows and cells. For a selection like the one shown below it would be: `}<em parentName="p">{`A1:D18`}</em>{`.`}</p>
    <p><a parentName="p" {...{
        "href": "/47094db34a8d27d2ff5f1e683807b48e/range.gif"
      }}><img parentName="a" {...{
          "src": "/47094db34a8d27d2ff5f1e683807b48e/range.gif",
          "alt": "range"
        }}></img></a></p>
    <p>{`And `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`verses`}</inlineCode>{` is a number, like `}<em parentName="p">{`1`}</em>{`, `}<em parentName="p">{`6`}</em>{` or `}<em parentName="p">{`3021`}</em>{`, representing how many verses you want your poem to have.`}</p>
    <p>{`That being said, an example query would look something similar to this:`}</p>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-graphql"
      }}>{`query {
  sheetpoem(
    spreadsheetId: "1qjgDw3TREpqQoSSbB0tzd0Joues1jraJix2mU52zToU"
    range: "A1:B50"
    verses: 4
  )
}
`}</code></pre>
    <p>{`You can try this query live at the `}<a parentName="p" {...{
        "href": "https://sheetpoetry.now.sh"
      }}>{`GraphQL Playground`}</a>{`.`}</p>
    <h2>{`Example`}</h2>
    <p>{`For this example we are using `}<a parentName="p" {...{
        "href": "https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1qjgDw3TREpqQoSSbB0tzd0Joues1jraJix2mU52zToU/edit?usp=sharing"
      }}>{`this spreadsheet`}</a>{` with "1000 chilean verses" selected by Felipe Cussen and Marcela Labraña.`}</p>
    <Example mdxType="Example" />

    </MDXLayout>;
}
;
